payload.answer: Duplicate Slack delivery detected for the same event ID. Process at most once; do not create a second memory for 'Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.'
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice
Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: This is a retry of the same Slack event ID, so no additional durable memory should be created or modified.

details: Detected duplicate Slack event by identical event ID
Suppressed duplicate write to avoid double-ingestion
No new memory cards emitted from the retry

repair_options: Use event ID idempotency to ensure only one write occurs
If the original event was not persisted, process exactly once and record a single memory card
Log the retry as a duplicate delivery without changing current memory state
